tool_input.command:
git add .caliber/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: update Caliber learning state

Auto-generated by Caliber session tracking.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G5U4Bc1SSdWTeSBbqF3Um9
EOF
)" && git push -u origin claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
tool_input.description: Commit and push caliber learning state

tool_response.stdout:
[2mcaliber: refreshing docs...[0m
caliber: no LLM provider configured — run `caliber config` first
[claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ bae0064] chore: update Caliber learning state
 2 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 13 deletions(-)
To http://127.0.0.1:33951/git/jakeoborn/Appetyt

branch 'claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ' set up to track 'origin/claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ'.

prompt_content: Sorry let's come up with other options

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
for d in \
  wayfarer.menu wayfarer.app \
  sojourn.menu sojourn.app \
  meridian.menu meridian.app \
  landfall.menu landfall.app \
  odyssey.menu \
  passage.menu passage.app \
  voyage.menu \
  expat.menu \
  daybreak.menu daybreak.app \
  nightfall.menu nightfall.app \
  primetime.menu \
  aperitif.menu aperitif.app \
  supperclub.com supperclub.app \
  supperhouse.com supperhouse.app \
  nightcover.com nightcover.app \
  twotop.com twotop.app \
  fourtop.com fourtop.app \
  regulars.menu \
  theregulars.com theregulars.app \
  topdrawer.menu \
  toptable.menu toptable.app \
  headtable.com headtable.app \
  housemade.menu housemade.app \
  underplate.com underplate.app \
  charger.menu \
  housedining.com housedining.app \
  nightservice.com nightservice.app \
  savedseat.com savedseat.app \
  primeseat.com primeseat.app \
  keptseat.com keptseat.app \
  opensitting.com opensitting.app \
  thebook.menu \
  tastingnotes.app \
  chefsnotes.com chefsnotes.app \
  menudrop.com menudrop.app \
  softopen.com softopen.app \
  softopen.menu softopen.app \
  setmenu.menu \
  welcometable.com welcometable.app \
  menuography.com menuography.app \
  eatscape.com eatscape.app \
  platery.com platery.app \
  ember.menu ember.app \
  hearth.menu hearth.app \
  proprietors.com proprietors.app \
  pantry.menu pantry.app \
  provisions.menu \
  delecta.com delecta.app \
  prandium.com prandium.app \
  degusta.com degusta.app \
  savora.menu \
  gusto.menu \
  omaki.com omaki.app \
  saporo.com saporo.app \
  salivate.menu \
  whetted.com whetted.app \
  epicur.com epicur.app \
  mouthful.com mouthful.app \
  covers.menu \
  seatings.com seatings.app \
  sittings.com sittings.app \
  coverage.menu; do
  check "$d"
done
tool_input.description: Third batch of name candidates across new directions
